title: colpart Dry Erase Markers Fine Tip - Pack Of 90 Black Whiteboard Markers Bulk With Low Odor White Board Markers Dry Erase For School, Office, Home, Work On White Board & Calendar, Refrigerator
features: 【Sufficient Dry Erase Markers】Colpart fine point dry erase markers set includes 90 whiteboard markers for marking,writing,doodling and all with black ink,huge quantity can meet your needs for replacement and keep you using for a long time in daily life.

【Premium Whiteboard Markers】our dry erase markers are specially formulated to provide a versatile writing experience with smear-proof, quick drying ink for bold and easy to read marks that wipe clean completely.

【Precision Whiteboard Markers】The fine tip Dry Erase Markers allows for precise writing and drawing on any dry erase surface.This makes these paint markers perfect for tasks that require accuracy, such as making charts, graphs, or diagrams.

【Easy to Use and Long-lasting】These dry erase markers offer a smooth ink flow and a comfortable grip, which make them easy to use for extended periods of time without causing hand fatigue.The ink is designed to last a long time,even with frequent use.

【Low-Odor Ink】The low-odor ink formula ensures that there is no strong smell or unpleasant fumes when using these whiteboard markers, making them safe for use in classrooms,offices, or other shared spaces.(Tips:not suitable for the children under 3 years old)
